name: QUIC (RFC 9000)
description: The IETF transport protocol that MoQ runs on. Provides reliable, multiplexed streams and unreliable datagrams over UDP.

name: IETF WebTransport
description: A bidirectional client/server transport over HTTP/3 that gives applications direct access to QUIC.

name: W3C WebTransport
description: The browser JavaScript API exposing WebTransport, enabling MoQ in web applications.

name: MOQT (Media over QUIC Transport)
description: The ongoing IETF MoQ working group draft defining publish/subscribe and fan-out semantics on top of QUIC and WebTransport.

name: IETF MoQ working group
description: Home for MOQT and related drafts, including catalog and format specifications layered above the transport.
